creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)

The upstream repo was https://github.com/janestreet/type_conv.

It is now redirecting to https://github.com/janestreet-deprecated/type_conv

There there is a notice: "About Deprecated, use ppx_type_conv instead (see https://github.com/janestreet/ppx_type_conv)"

https://github.com/janestreet/ppx_type_conv redirects to https://github.com/janestreet-deprecated/ppx_type_conv

And again there is another deprecation notice recommending to use ppxlib instead.
